properties.description: Situated in a peaceful residential neighbourhood, this well-maintained three-bedroom family home offers a comfortable and practical living environment. The property features a spacious living room with large windows that provide plenty of natural light, a modern fitted kitchen with ample storage, and a separate dining area ideal for family meals. All three bedrooms are generously sized, with the master bedroom benefiting from an en-suite bathroom, while a contemporary family bathroom serves the remaining rooms. The home also includes a private landscaped garden, secure parking for two vehicles, and a covered terrace perfect for outdoor entertaining. Conveniently located close to schools, supermarkets, healthcare facilities, and public transport links, this property is an excellent choice for families seeking both comfort and accessibility.

Nestled along Temple Road, Kandy 20000, this charming hotel combines modern luxury with the rich cultural heritage of Sri Lanka's hill capital. The elegantly designed rooms feature comfortable king or twin beds, air conditioning, complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi, smart televisions, and private balconies overlooking the lush greenery or city skyline. Guests can savour authentic Sri Lankan and international cuisine at the on-site restaurant, unwind in the outdoor swimming pool, or relax with a selection of spa and wellness treatments. The hotel also offers meeting facilities, a fitness centre, and 24-hour front desk service to ensure a comfortable stay. Conveniently located just minutes from the Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic, Kandy Lake, and popular shopping and cultural attractions, this hotel provides the perfect base for both business and leisure travellers.

Located at No. 25, Lake Road, Boralesgamuwa 10290, this beautifully maintained two-storey family home offers a perfect balance of comfort, style, and convenience. The property features four spacious bedrooms, including a master suite with an en-suite bathroom and built-in wardrobes, along with a modern family bathroom and a separate guest washroom. The bright and airy living room flows seamlessly into a contemporary kitchen fitted with quality cabinetry, ample storage, and a generous dining area ideal for family gatherings. Large windows throughout the home provide abundant natural light, while the private landscaped garden and covered patio create an inviting space for outdoor relaxation and entertaining. Additional features include secure parking, a laundry area, and easy access to schools, supermarkets, healthcare facilities, and public transport, making this an excellent home for growing families.

Ideally situated on Bentota Beach Road, Bentota 80500, this beachfront hotel offers a relaxing coastal retreat with stunning views of the Indian Ocean. The tastefully furnished rooms feature modern décor, air conditioning, complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen televisions, minibars, and private balconies overlooking the sea or tropical gardens. Guests can enjoy fresh seafood and international cuisine at the hotel's restaurant, unwind by the outdoor swimming pool, or rejuvenate with a range of spa and wellness treatments. Direct beach access, water sports activities, and beautifully landscaped gardens provide the perfect setting for both relaxation and adventure. Conveniently located close to Bentota River, local attractions, and transport links, the hotel is an excellent destination for couples, families, and holidaymakers seeking a memorable seaside escape.

Situated at No. 14, Main Street, Matara 81000, this attractive family home offers spacious living in a convenient and well-connected neighbourhood. The property comprises three generously sized bedrooms, two modern bathrooms, a bright and welcoming living area, and a fully fitted kitchen with ample cupboard space and quality finishes. The open-plan dining area overlooks a private rear garden, creating an ideal setting for family meals and entertaining guests. Additional features include tiled flooring throughout, a dedicated laundry room, secure parking, and a covered veranda perfect for relaxing outdoors. Located within easy reach of schools, supermarkets, hospitals, public transport, and Matara's town centre, this home provides an excellent combination of comfort, practicality, and everyday convenience.

Located on Nilaveli Beach Road, Nilaveli, Trincomalee 31010, this luxury beachfront hotel offers a peaceful escape surrounded by pristine white sands and crystal-clear waters. The spacious guest rooms and suites are elegantly furnished with contemporary décor, featuring air conditioning, complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen televisions, minibars, and private balconies with breathtaking ocean or garden views. Guests can enjoy a variety of dining options serving fresh seafood, authentic Sri Lankan specialties, and international cuisine. The hotel also features an outdoor infinity pool, a full-service spa, a fitness centre, and direct access to the beach. Popular activities such as snorkelling, diving at Pigeon Island National Park, and whale watching are easily accessible, making this hotel an ideal destination for families, couples, and travellers seeking a relaxing coastal getaway.

Located at No. 33, Lake View Avenue, Kurunegala 60000, this elegant family home offers spacious accommodation in a quiet and highly desirable residential neighbourhood. The property features four well-proportioned bedrooms, including a master bedroom with an en-suite bathroom, a stylish family bathroom, and a bright open-plan living and dining area designed for comfortable everyday living. The modern kitchen is fitted with quality cabinetry, generous worktops, and ample storage space, making it ideal for family cooking and entertaining. Large windows throughout the home provide excellent natural light, while the private garden and covered outdoor seating area create the perfect setting for relaxation or hosting guests. Additional features include secure parking, a separate utility room, and close proximity to schools, shopping centres, healthcare facilities, and major transport links, making this home an excellent choice for modern family living.
